project_rules: All code is vanilla JavaScript (no frameworks except Canvas and Vite for bundling)
Test-first development: failing test → implementation → verify
Encounter types are gated: options unavailable without required stats/equipment
World procgen must validate pathfinding (start→goal) before accepting seed
No console logs in production code (use debug mode if needed)
Each Phase has acceptance gates before moving to next

serpent-architect.specialty: World generation, terrain, procgen algorithms, encounter design
phase_1_tasks: Implement ProcGen.generate(seed, difficulty) with terrain distribution
Implement World class with entity management
Write tests for procgen (reproducibility, pathfinding validation)

decision-engine.specialty: AI logic, pathfinding, personality system, encounter resolution
phase_1_tasks: Implement A* pathfinding with personality bias weights
Write tests for pathfinding and personality weighting

ui-forge.specialty: Canvas rendering, draft UI, encounter display, state machine

test-warden.specialty: Unit tests, integration tests, scenario validation, edge cases
phase_1_tasks: Write tests for World class (add/retrieve entities)
Write tests for ProcGen (seed reproducibility, pathfinding validation)
Write tests for SnakeAgent (health, score tracking)
Write tests for Pathfinding (shortest path, personality bias)
